info.title: Repository Scanner
info.description: API for scanning a Git repository and listing its files.

post.summary: Scans a public Git repository and returns a list of its files and key file contents.
post.description: This tool takes a public GitHub repository URL, clones it, lists all files, and reads the contents of key project files (like requirements.txt, package.json, Dockerfile, etc.). Use this when a user wants you to analyze a GitHub repository.

repo_url.description: The full URL of the public GitHub repository to scan.

200.description: A JSON object containing file paths and key file contents.

key_file_contents.description: Contents of key project files like requirements.txt, package.json, Dockerfile, etc.

error.description: Error message if the scan failed.
